feature.name: Mako template lexer and expression parse core
feature.description: Extract Mako template lexing into a parse tree plus Python expression/control fragment analysis without original mako import or template runtime rendering.
included_behaviors: lex template source into parsetree nodes (text, expression, control, tags)
analyze Python fragments for declared and undeclared identifiers
report SyntaxException and CompileException with line positions
excluded_behaviors: template compilation, codegen, and runtime rendering

entanglement.description: Mako lexer couples nested tag/control stacks, parsetree node construction, and AST-based Python fragment analysis shared with codegen paths.
signals: lexer tag and control_line stacks with ternary elif/except handling
parsetree nodes invoke ast.PythonFragment for partial control lines
pyparser FindIdentifiers walks _ast_util parse trees for identifier sets
expression nodes merge filter escape builtins with code undeclared sets

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Lexer, parsetree, PythonCode, PythonFragment, SyntaxException, CompileException
output.signature: Lexer(text: str, filename: str | None = None).parse() -> parsetree.TemplateNode
